20.t: He would certainly have taken away

28.t: He will cause you to die

36.t: and he got [both of] them out

70.t: (will) surely be those who are guided

76.t: so that they argue with you

93.t: And they were made to drink

96.t: And surely you will find them
he could be granted a life

125.t: and those who seclude themselves for devotion and prayer

137.t: So will suffice you against them

144.t: So We will surely turn you

155.t: And surely We will test you

185.t: then he should fast in it
then prescribed number (should be made up)

219.t: But sin of both of them

220.t: surely He (could have) put you in difficulties

228.t: And the women who are divorced

255.t: the Sustainer of all that exists

259.t: Then he was made to die
